APP SETUP
=========

**1. Download the App and Log In**

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: App download QR and marketplace placeholder.
   :width: 320px

Search for "Jackery" in Google Play or App Store to install the App, then register and log in.
You can also scan the product QR code to download and install the App.

**2. Add Device**

2.1 Click the add-device button in the App.

2.2 Press the POWER button on the device to turn it on.
When the Wi-Fi and Bluetooth icons flash, the device is in network configuration mode.
Tap "Icon Flashed", allow nearby-device access, and enable Bluetooth permission.

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: App add device step placeholder.
   :width: 320px

Main POWER Button

AC Power Button

DC/USB Power Button

2.3 After tapping the searched device icon, the App connects the device through Bluetooth automatically.

**NOTE**

If "the device has been bound" appears:

- Ask the device owner to share the device through the App.
- Press and hold POWER + DC/USB power button for 3 seconds to reset Wi-Fi and Bluetooth, then bind again.

2.4 After successful Bluetooth connection, enter the Wi-Fi password and tap OK.

**NOTE**

- Use a 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi network. 5 GHz Wi-Fi is not supported.

After successful device addition, the Wi-Fi icon stays on.

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: App setup result screen placeholder.
   :width: 360px

The above screenshots are for reference only.

**CAUTION**

The Jackery App can connect to only one power station over Bluetooth at a time.
Returning to the device list disconnects Bluetooth automatically.
Tap the power station again to reconnect.

**3. Unbind the Device**

Open device Settings from the top-right corner of the device page,
then tap Unbind at the bottom of the settings page.

**4. Notes**

**4.1 To Turn On Wi-Fi and Bluetooth**

- Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are automatically turned on after device startup.
- Hold DC/USB power button + AC power button until both icons light up.

**4.2 To Turn Off Wi-Fi and Bluetooth**

Hold DC/USB power button + AC power button until both icons are off.

**4.3 To Reset Wi-Fi and Bluetooth**

Hold POWER button + DC/USB power button for 3 seconds to reset Wi-Fi and Bluetooth to factory settings.
The connected App account will be unbound after reset.
